ddl_schema:
CREATE TABLE mine_areas (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  area_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  mineral_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  province TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE reserves (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  mine_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  tonnage REAL NOT NULL,
  depth_m REAL NOT NULL,
  grade_pct REAL NOT NULL,
  surveyed_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (mine_id) REFERENCES mine_areas(id)
);

mine_areas.mineral_type: Mineral type: coal | copper | gold | iron | bauxite | tungsten

reserves.id: Primary key of a reserve survey record

few_shot_examples.question: Các khu vực mỏ khai thác than
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT area_name AS area_name, mineral_type AS mineral_type, province AS province, status AS status FROM mine_areas WHERE mineral_type = 'coal'

few_shot_examples.question: Tổng trữ lượng tấn theo từng khu vực mỏ
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT m.area_name AS area_name, m.mineral_type AS mineral_type, ROUND(SUM(r.tonnage), 1) AS total_tonnage, ROUND(AVG(r.depth_m), 1) AS avg_depth_m FROM mine_areas m JOIN reserves r ON m.id = r.mine_id GROUP BY m.id, m.area_name, m.mineral_type ORDER BY total_tonnage DESC

few_shot_examples.question: So sánh trữ lượng theo loại khoáng sản
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT m.mineral_type AS mineral_type, ROUND(SUM(r.tonnage), 1) AS total_tonnage, ROUND(AVG(r.grade_pct), 2) AS avg_grade_pct FROM mine_areas m JOIN reserves r ON m.id = r.mine_id GROUP BY m.mineral_type ORDER BY total_tonnage DESC

few_shot_examples.question: Top 5 khu vực mỏ có trữ lượng lớn nhất
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT m.area_name AS area_name, m.mineral_type AS mineral_type, ROUND(SUM(r.tonnage), 1) AS total_tonnage FROM mine_areas m JOIN reserves r ON m.id = r.mine_id GROUP BY m.id, m.area_name, m.mineral_type ORDER BY total_tonnage DESC LIMIT 5
